task_completion.description: Open the specified sample scene in OpenToonz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenToonz application is open and the title bar, xsheet, or project browser shows 'dwanko_run.tnz' is loaded.

task_completion.description: Change the character's line art to Neon Cyan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Style Editor shows the line art color set to RGB (0, 255, 255), or the character in the main viewer is visibly drawn with bright cyan lines.

task_completion.description: Change the background to solid Dark Blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Camera Background settings or a solid color layer shows the color set to RGB (0, 0, 50), or the viewer background is visibly dark blue.

task_completion.description: Set the render format to PNG and the frame range to the first 12 frames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings dialog shows the file format set to 'png' and the frame range set from 1 to 12.

task_completion.description: Set the output directory to the specified blueprint folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings dialog shows the 'Save In' path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/blueprint/'.

task_completion.description: Render the sequence and verify the output files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A render progress bar is shown completing, or a file manager/terminal window displays the 12 generated PNG files in the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/blueprint/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenToonz menus, palettes, and dialogs rather than using external command-line image processing tools like ImageMagick.

integrity.description: The agent rendered the frames using OpenToonz.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent opens the Output Settings and initiates a render within OpenToonz, rather than copying or downloading pre-existing images into the output directory.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by editing the project files as text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open the '.tnz' file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually type in the RGB values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source scene is located at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The target output directory is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/blueprint'. The agent must generate exactly 12 PNG frames. The target line color is Neon Cyan (RGB: 0, 255, 255) and the target background color is Dark Blue (RGB: 0, 0, 50). A color tolerance of 30 (Euclidean distance) is acceptable for the final output.
